backstory.original: There's savage, and then there's Torogar. Few had even survived a head-to-head match with him before he ran into Arkhan the Cruel. He was known worlds over as an unstoppable brute. Now, as a part of the Dark Order, Torogar leads armies and communes with a god, but he's always down for another one-on-one match.
backstory.display: 先有野蛮人，后有托罗加。在他遇到残暴者阿克汉之前，很少有人能在与他的正面对决中幸存下来，他以“不可阻挡的野蛮人”称号闻名于世。如今作为黑暗教团的一员，托罗加率领军队并与一位神灵交流，但他总是渴望着一对一的对决。

description.original: Torogar inflames his golden blades and then attacks the nearest enemy.
description.display: 托罗加点燃他的金色剑刃，攻击距离最近的敌人。

description.original: Torogar lowers his head and rushes a random distant enemy, leaving a trail of fire in his wake. The fire deals damage over time to enemies who stand in it.
description.display: 托罗加低头冲向一名随机的远处敌人，在身后留下一道烈焰之痕。火焰会对站在上面的敌人造成持续伤害。

longDescription.original: Torogar lowers his head and rushes a random distant enemy, leaving a trail of fire in his wake. The fire deals damage over time to enemies who stand in it.
longDescription.display: 托罗加低头冲向一名随机的远处敌人，在身后留下一道烈焰之痕。火焰会对站在上面的敌人造成持续伤害。

description.original: Torogar gains Zealot stacks when he or an adjacent Champion kills an enemy. Zealot stacks increase his damage and the damage of other evil Champions (via Preach).
description.display: 托罗加或与他相邻的勇士击杀敌人时，托罗加获得狂热者层数。狂热者层数会提高他的伤害和其他邪恶阵营勇士的伤害（通过宣讲）。

description.original: Torogar goes into a blood rage whenever he reaches certain Zealot stack threshholds, increasing the effect of all his other abilities.
description.display: 托罗加的狂热者层数到达某个阈值时会进入血怒状态，提高他所有其他技能的效果。

conditions.desc: Whenever Torogar, an adjacent Champion, or any evil Champion kills an enemy, Torogar gains a Zealot stack. Torogar's Damage is increased by $amount% for each Zealot stack he has collected (additive), and stacks persist through resets.

Whenever Torogar or an adjacent Champion kills an enemy, Torogar gains a Zealot stack. Torogar's Damage is increased by $amount% for each Zealot stack he has collected (additive), and stacks persist through resets.
每当托罗加或一位相邻勇士或任何邪恶阵营勇士杀死一名敌人，托罗加获得一层狂热者。堆叠的每层狂热者均使托罗加的伤害提高 $amount%（以加算方式堆叠），并在重置冒险后仍然有效。
每当托罗加或一位相邻勇士杀死一名敌人，托罗加获得一层狂热者。堆叠的每层狂热者均使托罗加的伤害提高 $amount%（以加算方式堆叠），并在重置冒险后仍然有效。

tipText.original: Torogar gains Zealot stacks whenever he or an adjacent Champion kill an enemy; Zealot stacks empower Torogar and his allies
tipText.display: 托罗加或与他相邻的勇士杀死敌人时，托罗加获得狂热者叠层。狂热者可强化托罗加与他的盟友

description.desc: Increase the damage of all other evil Champions by $amount% for each Zealot stack Torogar has (additive)
托罗加每堆叠一层狂热者，就使所有其他邪恶阵营勇士的伤害提高 $amount%（以加算方式堆叠）

conditions.desc: Whenever Torogar's Zealot stacks reaches a multiple of 50, Torogar enters a Blood Rage for 45 seconds. While active, if Torogar fails to kill an enemy he adds a Mark of Tiamat to them, increasing damage taken from all Champions by 300%. At several Zealot Stack levels Blood Rage adds additional benefits.

Whenever Torogar's Zealot stacks reaches a multiple of 50, Torogar enters a Blood Rage for $amount seconds. While active, if Torogar fails to kill an enemy he adds a Mark of Tiamat to them, increasing damage taken from all Champions by 300%. At several Zealot Stack levels Blood Rage adds additional benefits.
狂热者堆叠至 50 层时，托罗加变为血怒状态，持续 45 秒。处于此状态时，如果托罗加未能击杀敌人，则会对其刻下提亚马特的印记，使所有勇士对该敌人的伤害提升 300%。狂热者堆叠至一定层数时，血怒会附加额外加成。
每当托罗加的狂热者叠层达到 50 的倍数时，托罗加就会进入血怒状态，持续 $amount秒。处于此状态时，如果托罗加未能击杀敌人，则会对其刻下提亚马特的印记，使所有勇士对该敌人的伤害提升 300%。狂热者堆叠至一定层数时，血怒会附加额外加成。

tipText.original: Torogar periodically enters a Blood Rage, greatly empowering his abilities.
tipText.display: 托罗加周期性地进入血怒状态，大幅强化他的技能。

specializationDescription.original: Torogar works with the other evil Champions in the formation to more quickly gain Zealot stacks.
specializationDescription.display: 托罗加与阵型中的其他邪恶勇士合作，获得狂热者叠层的速度加快。

specializationDescription.original: Torogar Blood Rages longer, and can manually trigger it using his ultimate.
specializationDescription.display: 托罗加的血怒持续时间更长，并可以通过杀招手动触发。

description.desc: Increase the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Dark Order member adjacent to $source. $torogar_synergy_desc
每有一位黑暗教团成员与$source相邻，$(upgrade_name id)的效果即提升 $(not_buffed amount)%。$torogar_synergy_desc

description.original: I wouldn't if I were you...
description.display: 如果我是你，我不会......

description.original: Ready to burn?
description.display: 准备好烧起来了吗？

description.original: For Arkhan, anything.
description.display: 为了阿克汉，任何事都可以。

description.original: I am the tip of the spear for Tiamat.
description.display: 我是提亚马特的矛尖。

description.original: Arkhan's Tower is our lair within Avernus. Keep it safe.
description.display: 阿克汉的高塔是我们在阿弗纳斯的巢穴。保证那里的安全。

description.original: He gifted me my life, and gave me access to a GOD.
description.display: 他赐予了我生命，让我有机会接触到神。

description.original: I would follow Arkhan into the Abyss.
description.display: 我会追随阿克汉进入深渊。

description.original: I am a conqueror, in her unholy name.
description.display: 奉她之邪名，我是一名征服者。

description.original: Intimidating is the goal.
description.display: 目的就是要吓人。

description.original: Cuts through war machine as easy as imp.
description.display: 削铁如泥。

description.original: Flames aren't necessary. They are just fun.
description.display: 火焰不是必要的。它们只是好玩而已。

description.original: I give my fealty to thee... Arkhan.
description.display: 我向您效忠......阿克汉。

description.original: I tore it off of a dwarf.
description.display: 我从一个矮人身上扯下来的。

description.original: Needs more horns.
description.display: 需要多一点角。

description.original: I can FEEL Tiamat's power coursing through me!
description.display: 我能感觉提亚马特的力量在涌入我的身体！

description.original: I dare you.
description.display: 我谅你也不敢。

description.original: A sign of my service to Arkhan the Cruel.
description.display: 我侍奉残暴者阿克汉的象征。

description.original: The last fiend that touched it lost their arm.
description.display: 最后一个碰过那东西的炼狱生物手臂没了。

description.original: Arkhan's Tower is the fallback point!
description.display: 撤退点是阿克汉之塔！

description.original: My rage burns with the power of the Dragon Goddess!
description.display: 我的怒火随着龙女神的力量而燃烧！

description.original: Always make an entrance.
description.display: 总有登场的机会。

description.original: When he bested me, he offered me these and my life.
description.display: 当他打败我时，他给了我这些和我的命。

description.original: These bracers are a must for smashing, burning, and boredom.
description.display: 这护手是你砸东西，烧东西以及打发无聊时光的必备之物。

description.original: Tiamat's will be done.
description.display: 提亚马特会被打倒的。

description.original: We shall not speak of it here. Come with me.
description.display: 我们不该在这里谈论这东西。跟我来。

description.original: Tiamat is coming. You should begin your preparations.
description.display: 提亚马特要来了。你要开始做准备了。

description.original: Arkhan placed me at his right hand.
description.display: 阿克汉曾把我放在他的右手边。

description.original: We fight for the will of Tiamat!
description.display: 我们为了提亚马特的意志而战！

description.original: In Avernus, this can get you places.
description.display: 在阿弗纳斯，这东西能让你找到地方。

description.original: Power is absolute.
description.display: 力量是绝对的。

description.original: If ever Arkhan is bested, this is the exit.
description.display: 要是阿克汉被打败了，这就是出口。

description.original: Krull believes names have power. He trusts in the wrong power.
description.display: 克鲁尔相信名字是有力量的。他相信了错误的力量。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Minotaur Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CON score of 13 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a DEX score of 13 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Melee Champion in the formation

character_sheet_details.backstory: There's savage, and then there's Torogar. Few had even survived a head-to-head match with him before he ran into Arkhan the Cruel. He was known worlds over as an unstoppable brute. Now, as a part of the Dark Order, Torogar leads armies and communes with a god, but he's always down for another one-on-one match.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Torogar grows in power over time and prioritizes buffing himself and other evil Champions. He works well with other members of The Dark Order, including Arkhan and Krull.

event_upgrades.name: Markings of a Zealot
event_upgrades.description: Torogar gains Zealot stacks when he or an adjacent Champion kills an enemy. Zealot stacks increase his damage and the damage of other evil Champions (via Preach).

event_upgrades.name: Blood Rage
event_upgrades.description: Torogar goes into a blood rage whenever he reaches certain Zealot stack threshholds, increasing the effect of all his other abilities.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 先有野蛮人，后有托罗加。在他遇到残暴者阿克汉之前，很少有人能在与他的正面对决中幸存下来，他以“不可阻挡的野蛮人”称号闻名于世。如今作为黑暗教团的一员，托罗加率领军队并与一位神灵交流，但他总是渴望着一对一的对决。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 托罗加的力量会随着时间推移而增长，他会优先给自己和其他邪恶勇士提供增益。他能与黑暗教团的其他成员默契协作，包括阿克汉和克鲁尔。

event_upgrades.name: 狂热者标记
event_upgrades.description: 托罗加或与他相邻的勇士击杀敌人时，托罗加获得狂热者层数。狂热者层数会提高他的伤害和其他邪恶阵营勇士的伤害（通过宣讲）。

event_upgrades.name: 血怒
event_upgrades.description: 托罗加的狂热者层数到达某个阈值时会进入血怒状态，提高他所有其他技能的效果。
